did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper is a review article that summarizes existing literature on skin disease classification techniques using machine learning and deep learning (e.g., SVM, CNN, MobileNets). It does not present original experimental results obtained by the authors using AI; rather, it discusses methodologies and datasets (like HAM10000) from other studies.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
